nasb.text: Now David built houses for himself in the city of David; and he prepared a place for the ark of God and pitched a tent for it.

esv.text: David built houses for himself in the city of David. And he prepared a place for the ark of God and pitched a tent for it.

cnv.text: 大衛在大衛城為自己建造宮殿，又為　神的約櫃預備地方，就是為它支搭帳幕。

ccb.text: 大卫在大卫城为自己建造宫殿，并为上帝的约柜预备地方，支搭帐篷。
